description: Refactor the 'checkStock' method in the 'InventoryService' class to 'verifyAndReserve' with the signature (String locationId, String sku, int quantity, boolean strictMode). The 'locationId' parameter must be the first parameter with a default value of "MAIN", and 'strictMode' must be the last parameter with a default value of true. Ensure the project compiles successfully and all call sites are updated automatically.
